prompt: Using the provided reference image, keep the same person and realistic photographic look, but transform it into a travel snapshot taken outdoors at Kyoto's Kinkaku-ji. Replace the arcade interior with the Golden Pavilion beside a calm pond, with green trees, cloudy daylight sky, and a bamboo fence in the foreground. Recompose to a vertical smartphone photo showing the subject from about mid-thigh up, standing in front of the pavilion and making a peace sign with her left hand near her face. Change the outfit to a white short-sleeve T-shirt under a sleeveless white patterned dress, and add a thin crossbody strap and a bracelet. Remove all subtitles, watermarks, claw machines, and stuffed toys. Keep the face area obscured/blurred as in the reference.
